title: Immunohistochemical Staining of Heparanase in Human Pancreas Islets
author: Lora Starrs
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kv4cw8w

steps.title: Deparaffinize slides in each xylene for 1 min
steps.instruction: Deparaffinize slides in each xylene for 1 min. rehydrate slides in graded alcohols beginning in absolute ethanol (10 dips)/ container of absolute ethanol), followed by 90% ethanol (10 dips) and 70% ethanol (10 dips). Wash well in running tap water for 5 min.

steps.title: Wipe around sections with a tissue,...
steps.instruction: Wipe around sections with a tissue, encircle the sections using a diamond pencil and place in a slide container of tap water (250 ml).

steps.title: Block endogenous peroxidase activity by incubating...
steps.instruction: Block endogenous peroxidase activity by incubating sections in 3% hydrogen peroxide in methanol (25 ml 30% H 2 O 2 + 225 ml methanol).

steps.title: Wash 2 x 2 min in...
steps.instruction: Wash 2 x 2 min in 250 ml phosphate-buffered saline (PBS) followed by wash in running tap water for 5 min.

steps.title: Prepare citrate buffer, pH 6 for antigen retrieval
steps.instruction: Prepare citrate buffer, pH 6 for antigen retrieval. Dissolve 1.05 g Citric acid in 500 ml deionized water and pH using 2 - 10 M NaOH.

steps.title: Transfer slides to 250ml citrate buffer...
steps.instruction: Transfer slides to 250ml citrate buffer and heat in microwave (1600 watt) for 2 min on High power followed by 2 x 6 min on Low power. Allow the slides to cool on the bench for 30 min. Wash slides in 250 ml PBS, 3 x 10 min.

steps.title: Wipe around sections using tissue
steps.instruction: Wipe around sections using tissue. To block non-specific binding of Ig, apply M.O.M. diluent to tissue sections and incubate for 5 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Tip off excess block in Step...
steps.instruction: Tip off excess block in Step 7, wipe around sections using tissue and incubate with 340 μg/ml HP130 anti-Hpse mAb (or 350 μg/ml mouse IgG 1κ as isotype control; diluted in M.O.M. diluent), 125-150 μl/section at room temperature for 30 min. (Alternative: 228 μg/ml HPA1 rabbit anti-human heparanase IgG or 227 μg/ml rabbit IgG as isotype control).

steps.title: Wash off primary antibody with PBS...
steps.instruction: Wash off primary antibody with PBS and transfer slides to slide container with 250 ml PBS. Wash 2 x 2min.

steps.title: Wipe around sections using tissue and...
steps.instruction: Wipe around sections using tissue and incubate with 1/250 diluted secondary biotinylated-anti-mouse IgG (M.O.M. immunodetection kit), 150 μl/section, for 10 min at room temperature. (Alternative: 37 μg/ml HRP-swine anti-rabbit Ig)

steps.title: Wash off secondary antibody with PBS...
steps.instruction: Wash off secondary antibody with PBS and transfer to slide container with 250 ml PBS. Wash slides 2 x 2min.

steps.title: Wipe around sections using tissue and...
steps.instruction: Wipe around sections using tissue and cover with Vectastain ABC reagent (M.O.M immunodetection kit), for 5 min at room temperature. (alternative: delete Step 13 if HPA1 anti-heparanase pAb is used)

steps.title: Wash off ABC reagent with PBS...
steps.instruction: Wash off ABC reagent with PBS and transfer to slide container with 250 ml PBS. Wash slides 3x in 10 min. (alternative: delete Step 14 if HPA1 anti-heparanase pAb is used)

steps.title: Prepare AEC working solution
steps.instruction: Prepare AEC working solution: 4.75 ml acetate buffer (see Guidelines), 0.25ml AEC stock solution and 25 μml 3% H 2 O 2 . Filter using a disposable 0.2 μm filter. Use within 2 hours of preparation, refrigerate for short-term storage. Protect from light.

steps.title: Wipe around sections using tissue and...
steps.instruction: Wipe around sections using tissue and cover the sections with AEC solution for 30 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash off AEC solution with deionized...
steps.instruction: Wash off AEC solution with deionized water and transfer slides to slide container with 250 ml deionized water. Wash 3x in 10min.

steps.title: Lightly counterstain withMayer’s hematoxylin, wash in...
steps.instruction: Lightly counterstain withMayer’s hematoxylin, wash in deionized water (2 x) and briefly dip in ammonium water (100 μml ammonia in 250 ml deionized water), 2 x 2 sec. Wash in deionized water (2 x in 250 ml) and coverslip using glycergel mounting medium.

steps.title: Photograph sections using a light microscope with camera attachment
steps.instruction: Photograph sections using a light microscope with camera attachment.
